parameters.responseBody:
={{ {
  score: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.score,
  feedback: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.feedback,
  nextQuestion: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.nextQuestion,
  time_limit_seconds: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.time_limit_seconds,
  deadline_at: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.deadline_at,
  complexity_tier: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.complexity_tier,
  isFinal: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.isFinal,
  result: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.result || '',
  assessment_mode: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.assessment_mode || 'text',
  startSpeech: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.startSpeech || false,
  soft_skills: $("CODE - Pick Parse Result").first().json.soft_skills || null
} }}

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.mail_subject }}
parameters.message: ={{ (() => { let u = String($execution.resumeUrl || '').trim(); let b = String($json.config?.n8n_public_url || '').replace(/\/+$/, ''); if (b && /localhost|127\.0\.0\.1/i.test(u)) u = u.replace(/^https?:\/\/[^/]+/i, b); if (!u) throw new Error('resumeUrl empty'); return $json.mail_body_html.split($json.resume_url).join(encodeURIComponent(u)); })() }}

meta.description: Technical phases 1–5 (text) then communication phases 6–8 (speech). Same assessment-answer webhook. Import, set credentials, run supabase_speech_assessment.sql, activate.
